name: cyberhoot-leaderboard
description: Internal leaderboard ranking employees across all CyberHoot hotel environments by HootScore.

scripts.pack: node scripts/fetch-leaderboard.mjs && rm -f leaderboard-site.zip && cd public && zip -r -X ../leaderboard-site.zip . && cd .. && echo '\nReady: drag public/ folder OR leaderboard-site.zip onto Netlify.'
